description.optimized: Get a list of issues in a specified GitHub repository. You must provide the repository owner username and repository name. Optionally, you may include state, labels, assignee, and search terms to filter the returned issues.
description.original: Retrieves a list of issues in a specified GitHub repository. You must provide the repository owner username and repository name. Optionally, you may include state, labels, assignee, and search terms to filter the returned issues.

parameters.properties.owner.description.optimized: GitHub repository owner username or organization name.
parameters.properties.owner.description.original: A string containing the GitHub repository owner username or organization name.

parameters.properties.repo.description.optimized: repository name where issues should be listed.
parameters.properties.repo.description.original: A string containing the repository name where issues should be listed.

description.optimized: Searches Gmail messages for the connected user account. Required: a Gmail query string and may include pagination options to retrieve matching email conversations.
description.original: Searches Gmail messages for the connected user account. You must provide a Gmail query string and may include pagination options to retrieve matching email conversations.

parameters.properties.query.description.optimized: Gmail search query to execute for the connected account.
parameters.properties.query.description.original: A string containing the Gmail search query to execute for the connected account.

description.optimized: Queries a Notion database for pages that match a filter or search term. Required: the database identifier and may include filtering or sorting options.
description.original: Queries a Notion database for pages that match a filter or search term. You must provide the database identifier and may include filtering or sorting options.

description.optimized: Searches Slack messages in channels available to the connected user account. Required: the search query and can optionally specify a channel or date range.
description.original: Searches Slack messages in channels available to the connected user account. You must provide the search query and can optionally specify a channel or date range.

parameters.properties.query.description.original: A string containing the Slack search query to run.
